notes:
Ember 1.4.0

• Emergency lockdown ("panic button") — a hard local safety boundary cloud agents can't match. One click in Settings → Security instantly stops Ember's AI, cuts the network (Wi-Fi), and locks the screen; 'Restore network' brings you back. Optionally ARM auto-lockdown so a confirmed-malicious threat triggers it automatically (off by default). 'Restore network' re-enables Wi-Fi.

Includes bulk productivity (1.3.0) and the cohesive UI accent (1.2.9).
